INRB mobile laboratory installed at Miti-Murhesa to accelerate diagnosis.

Reception of RADIONE machine (4 modules) and glove box, as part of the decentralisation of PCR diagnostics. Training of providers planned (D+2). 82 samples collected and analysed: 18 positive, 61 negative, 3 invalid. Positivity rate: 22.0%. No samples pending. Deployment of a RADIONE machine (4 modules) to Mongbwalu health zone for decentralisation of laboratory diagnostics.

Reception of 100 collection kits (swabs). 39 samples collected in 24h. 10 tested at Petit Nord (0 positive). 147 results pending in Grand Nord — average delay > 5 days. Urgent need for catch-up plan (D+2).

Effective start of sample analysis (equipment installed and staff trained). 199 samples collected and analysed (positivity 32.6%); deployment of a machine in Mongbwalu HZ and effective start of sample analysis.
